fields.summary: Controls visitor-facing chat launchers, widget context, and websocket access across public pages.
fields.admin_requirements: Staff bridge widgets may connect only when the visitor chat product feature and deployment prerequisites are active.
fields.public_requirements: Public pages should only render chat launchers and websocket wiring when this suite feature is enabled and deployment prerequisites are met.
fields.service_requirements: Requires settings.PAGES_CHAT_ENABLED and the configured pages chat socket path to be available in the deployment.
